note: Immutable PrintSense test corpus. The frozen `graph` files under golden/ ARE the golden structured interpretations (harness-owned, committed, small); layer 1 replays them through the renderer with NO model calls, layer 2 (metamorphic) compares real degraded reads against them. golden/ was seeded from the renderer eval graphs and CORRECTED for completeness (e.g. golden/unrelated.graph.json carries the Micro820's real 24VDC control rail so a true rail reading is not counted as invention). Source photos are PROPRIETARY customer prints and are NEVER committed to git; each is pinned by sha256 here. Layers 2 and 3 (Telethon E2E) resolve them from the directory named by $PRINTSENSE_CORPUS_IMAGES, which tools/printsense_corpus_sync.py FETCHES AT RUNTIME from controlled staging storage (Doppler-injected PRINTSENSE_CORPUS_DIR or PRINTSENSE_CORPUS_URL) and verifies against these sha256 pins, failing closed on a mismatch. With no source configured the paid/live layers skip cleanly and free Layer 1 still runs off the committed golden graphs.
